story-context.story-title: CI/CD Pipeline Integration & Code Quality Hardening

acceptance-criteria.ac: Integrate check-env-vars.js into CI test job before build step
Integrate pre-deployment-check.js into CI deploy job before Vercel steps
CI runs lint, type-check, unit tests, integration tests, build on every PR
CI fails if any check fails (blocking merge)
Replace ~15 non-null assertion (!) shortcuts with proper null handling
Lighthouse CI with 90+ performance / 90+ accessibility (already in lighthouse.yml)
Pre-review checklist added to story templates
GitHub Actions CI status badge in README.md
Vercel preview URL posted as PR comment
All tests passing, zero TypeScript errors, zero lint warnings
docs/deployment-checklist.md updated with CI pipeline documentation

workflow.description: Main CI workflow: lint, type-check, tests, build, benchmarks, deploy to Vercel on push to main

jobs.job: Steps: checkout, setup-node, npm ci, type-check, lint, tests+coverage, Codecov upload, coverage threshold check, Playwright install, build, start server, benchmarks, PR benchmark comment
Steps: checkout, install Vercel CLI, vercel pull, vercel build --prod, vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod. Runs only on push to main.

gaps.gap: No Vercel preview URL comment on PRs

workflow.description: Lighthouse CI on PRs — scores 90+ performance, 90+ accessibility, 90+ best-practices (AC-10.10.6 satisfied)
Daily coverage report upload to Codecov

script.description: Validates that required environment variables are set. Exits with code 1 if any are missing.
script.required-vars: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, GITHUB_CLIENT_ID, GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET, CRON_SECRET, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
script.ci-integration: Add as step in test job: `run: node scripts/check-env-vars.js` with env vars from repository secrets

script.description: Runs type-check, lint, tests, and build validation. Returns exit code 1 on failure.
script.ci-integration: Add as step in deploy job before vercel commands: `run: node scripts/pre-deployment-check.js`

file.assertion: usageMap.get(categoryId)! — safe because checked with has() but use non-null-safe pattern
new Date(b.last_used_at!).getTime() — filtered to non-null above but use ?? ''
file.fix: line 129: usageMap.get(categoryId) with explicit check; lines 151-152: use `last_used_at ?? ''`

file.assertion: b.last_viewed_at! and a.last_viewed_at! — in sort after filter(i => i.last_viewed_at)
b.dismissed_at! and a.dismissed_at! — in sort after filter(i => i.dismissed_at)
b.last_metadata_expanded_at! and a.last_metadata_expanded_at! — in sort after filter
process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL! — add runtime guard with throw
liveRates[transaction.currency]! — already guarded by != null check above; remove the !

doc.change: Add GitHub Actions CI badge after the existing Codecov badge. Badge URL pattern: https://github.com/{owner}/{repo}/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg
Add pre-review checklist section before Dev Agent Record section (epic8-medium-2 action item)
Update CI/CD Workflows table to include env-check and pre-deployment-check steps; add note that preview URL is posted on PRs
